content.text:
Now I have a clear view of the molecule with atom indices labeled. Looking at atom C:22 (carbon), I can identify its neighbor atoms:

1. C:21 (carbon) - bonded to the left
2. C:23 (carbon) - bonded above
3. H:24 (hydrogen) - bonded to the right

Let me verify if there are any other connections by rotating the molecule slightly to get a better perspective of atom 22.

From the image, I can confirm that atom C:22 is connected to three atoms: C:21, C:23, and H:24.

The geomconf_index for this molecule is 1966, as indicated by the file name "geomconf_1966.xyz".

So the neighbor atoms of atom index 22 (C) are:
- Atom index 21 (C)
- Atom index 23 (C)
- Atom index 24 (H)

Geomconf_index: 1966

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 22, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
